title: 秋華賞の後に・勝利に酔って

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka taps into her true strength, pushing
through the intense Shuka Sho to defeat Daiwa
Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her loss, Daiwa Scarlet promises to hone
her skills and come back to defeat Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before walking off, she tells Vodka she will be
running in the Queen Elizabeth II Cup before the
Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling that she's not progressing as well as
Daiwa Scarlet, who always has a clear goal,
Vodka decides to run in the Arima Kinen as well.
